nl_query: Which scripts have been through more than one evaluation cycle and have at least one result history correction, showing the script URN, number of cycles, number of corrections, and the latest final marks.
failed_sql:
SELECT s.urn, COUNT(DISTINCT b.id) AS num_cycles, COUNT(DISTINCT rh.id) AS num_corrections, MAX(r.final_marks) AS latest_final_marks
FROM   answer_script s
JOIN   script_assignment sa ON sa.script_id = s.id AND sa.is_active = TRUE
JOIN   board b ON b.id = sa.board_id
JOIN   result r ON r.script_id = s.id
JOIN   result_history rh ON rh.result_id = r.id
GROUP  BY s.urn
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT b.id) > 1 AND COUNT(DISTINCT rh.id) > 0
error: Validation failed (schema): Column validation failed: script_assignment does NOT have board_id. Join via answer_script or evaluation_attempt to reach board.
